notes: It seems like the game hangs after the developer title card, but really it just takes 5+ minutes to load in each area for the first time. If you look at task manager it is maxing one core and slowly increasing RAM usage. I have this issue with multiple games, most notably Valve's "The Lab" demo.
title: Duck Season

notes: Game runs perfectly. I do see pixelation from time to time, but it is definitely playable.
title: Duck Season
